The target is an image:// URI pointing to design-source/company-info/p-08.
It records an added timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

standouts: It functions as a lightweight, timestamped cross-reference between a channel and an image asset.
It uses a custom image:// URI scheme for asset addressing.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
Follows the channel-memory naming pattern att-<uuid>.md.
Stores a channel, attachment_type, target URI, and added timestamp.
concerns: No descriptive text or caption for the attachment.
The image:// target cannot be verified from this file alone.
No author or provenance beyond the added timestamp.
notes: This is a timestamped image attachment metadata entry that ties the design-source channel to image://design-source/company-info/p-08.
